title: Handa-kun and a Girl's Friendship
overview: High-school student Handa Sei is well-liked and highly regarded -- except in his own mind.

title: Handa-kun and the Continuation of Episode 1 | Handa-kun and the Chairperson | Handa-kun and the Model
overview: As likeable as Handa is, his negative outlook leads to mixed results in his encounters with various students.

title: Handa-kun and the Truant | Handa-kun and Cooking Class | Handa-kun and His Friend
overview: Handa's daily antics inspire even more students to embrace him as a treasured friend -- unfortunately, without him realizing it.

title: Handa-kun and Handa-kun? | Handa-kun and a Girl's Jealousy | Handa-kun and Sociability
overview: Handa-kun has proven that he has an unusual charm attracting various people to him, including those he may not want to be associated with...

title: Handa-kun and the Student Council | Handa-kun and Memory Loss
overview: Despite his best efforts, Handa continues to get involved in the most bizarre situations. This time, his misadventures end up affecting his memory.

title: Handa-kun and His Friend's Friend | Handa-kun and Dash Higashino | Handa-kun and Palmistry
overview: Kawafuji decides to introduce Handa to his friend, but as usual, Handa's knack for misinterpretation turns the entire situation on its head.

title: Handa-kun and the Supplementary Exam | Handa-kun and the Library
overview: Sadly, the Handa Force has two members who need to take the supplementary exam. What they don't realize is that Handa himself is in the same boat.

title: Handa-kun and the School Trip
overview: The school trip becomes an unforgettable experience for Handa and the Handa Force when they encounter Ichimiya and his gang from Shiro High.

title: Handa-kun and the Frog | Handa-kun and the Stalker
overview: Handa's teacher plans to have his students dissect frogs, and Handa wants no part of it. But, as usual, Handa's feelings fail to come across.

title: Handa-kun and the Normal Guy | Handa-kun and the Bishoujo
overview: Kondo's time to shine finally arrives, while Handa gets caught in a conversation with a bishoujo figure.

title: Handa-kun and the School Festival Preperations
overview: Amidst preparations for the upcoming school cultural festival, Handa begins to gain a new perspective.

title: Handa-kun and the Cultural Festival
overview: High-school student Handa Sei is well-liked and highly regarded. As the school cultural festival comes to a close, Handa's world opens up before him.
